payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Partial dark brown wooden nightstand with a polished finish, showing a single visible drawer with a round dark knob and a rectangular top with small items; the piece is edge-cropped and partially occluded by the bed in the foreground and appears to be about 1.2 m from the camera.
